text: Code reviews are an essential part of software development. When developers check each other's code before it is added to the main project, they can catch bugs early before they cause bigger problems. This saves time and effort later. Additionally, code reviews encourage knowledge sharing within the team. A developer might learn a new technique or understand a different part of the codebase. Ultimately, this process helps improve the overall quality of the team's work. Everyone feels more responsible for the project, and the final product becomes more reliable.
